nasb.text: and Matthew and Thomas; James the son of Alphaeus, and Simon who was called the Zealot;

esv.text: and Matthew, and Thomas, and James the son of Alphaeus, and Simon who was called the Zealot,

cnv.text: 馬太、多馬、亞勒腓的兒子雅各、稱為激進派的西門、

ccb.text: 马太、多马、亚勒腓的儿子雅各、激进党人西门、

csbs.text: 马太、多马， 亚勒腓的儿子雅各， 称为激进派的西门，
